en:
### Certificate of Incorporation Please upload a Certificate of Incorporation ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Official document issued by the competent Companies Registrar: – *Federal Iraq*: Ministry of Trade – Companies Registration Department (Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Ministry of Trade and Industry – General Directorate of Company Registration (Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, or Duhok) 2. Name on the document (Supplier Legal Entity) 3. Certificate must be Valid 4. Company Incorporation Number 5. Incorporation Date
